response:
1. Business Goal
Allow customers to purchase one or more products securely through the e-commerce platform while ensuring inventory consistency, payment integrity, and timely order processing.

2. Primary Actor
Customer

3. Supporting Actors
Payment Gateway, Inventory Service, Order Management System, Notification Service, Warehouse System

4. Main Features
Place Order

5. Business Constraints
Cart cannot be empty. Ordered quantity cannot exceed available inventory. Coupon must be valid and unexpired. One coupon per order. Payment authorization must succeed before order creation. Inventory reservation must occur before confirmation. Order ID must be unique. Failed payment must not create an order. Payment timeout should release inventory reservation. Order confirmation should complete within 5 seconds.

6. External Dependencies
Inventory API, Payment Gateway API, Order Management API, Email Service, SMS Service, Warehouse API

7. Short Summary
The Place Order feature allows customers to securely purchase products on the e-commerce platform, ensuring inventory consistency, payment integrity, and timely processing. The workflow involves customers reviewing items, selecting delivery and payment, applying coupons, initiating payment, reserving inventory, and creating the order, all while adhering to defined business rules.
